title: Playbook row (v0.1)
description: Single JSONL row emitted by the finops-assess playbook reporter. playbook_schema_version '0.1' is additive-only: new top-level keys may be added without a version bump. Consumers MUST ignore unknown keys.

playbook_schema_version.description: Schema version. '0.1' for v0.5.0. Bump to '0.2' only on a breaking change.

ticket_key.description: Stable SHA-256 ID for cross-run deduplication. Stability depends on surface — see manifest pii_handling.ticket_key_stability_by_surface.

finding_revision.description: Monotonic revision counter for the playbook template. '1' in v0.5.0. Increments when the template structure changes in a future release.

surface.description: Cloud surface that produced this finding.

adapter_class.description: Adapter class hint. 'generic' in v0.5.0. Future values: 'azure_cost', 'identity', 'github_seat'.

principal.description: The affected principal — may be a SHA-256 hash when PII redaction is on.

current_sku.description: Currently assigned SKU identifier, if applicable.

estimated_monthly_savings_usd.description: Estimated monthly savings in USD, if the rule can compute one.

evidence_ref.description: Opaque reference to the evidence dict (e.g. AdvisoryFindingKey). Consumers MUST NOT sum EstimatedMonthlySavingsUsd across rows sharing an evidence_ref.

template_render_inputs.description: Sorted list of Jinja2 variable names referenced by the rule's .j2 template, extracted statically at env-build time.

title.description: Single-line ticket title rendered from the rule template.

description.description: Multi-line ticket description rendered from the rule template.

remediation_steps.description: Ordered list of remediation steps rendered from the rule template.

verification_checklist.description: Checklist items for verifying the remediation rendered from the rule template.

references.description: Reference URLs and documentation links rendered from the rule template.

adapter_hints.description: Optional sub-dicts with system-specific hints for ServiceNow, Jira, and GitHub Issues. Derived from severity and adapter_class.
